org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.commandbase.subsystems.swerve

Class OctoSwerveModuleV2

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.commandbase.subsystems.swerve.OctoSwerveModuleV2

  • public class OctoSwerveModuleV2
extends java.lang.Object
    Encoder-agnostic swerve module with independent steering and drive control.

    This is the updated version of OctoSwerveModule that supports both OctoQuad digital encoders and SRS Hub analog encoders via the SwerveEncoder interface.

    Encoder Flexibility:

    This module can use:

    • OctoQuad Digital: High-precision 8192 CPR encoders (recommended)
    • SRS Hub Analog: Potentiometers or magnetic encoders (lower cost)

    Switch between encoder types via Constants.SWERVE_ENCODER_TYPE

    Construction:

    Use OctoSwerveDrivetrainV2 which automatically creates the correct encoder type based on configuration.

    See Also:
    SwerveEncoder, OctoQuadSwerveEncoder, AnalogSwerveEncoder

      • getLastDriveFeedforward

        public double getLastDriveFeedforward()
        Gets the last calculated drive feedforward value.
        Returns:
        feedforward = kS * sign(velocity) + kV * velocity

      • getLastDrivePIDCorrection

        public double getLastDrivePIDCorrection()
        Gets the last drive PID correction value.
        Returns:
        PID correction term

      • getLastDriveMotorPower

        public double getLastDriveMotorPower()
        Gets the last motor power applied to the drive motor.
        Returns:
        motor power after feedforward + PID + slew rate limiting

      • getLastSteerFeedforward

        public double getLastSteerFeedforward()
        Gets the last calculated steering feedforward value (kS).
        Returns:
        kS * sign(error)

      • getLastSteerPIDCorrection

        public double getLastSteerPIDCorrection()
        Gets the last steering PID correction value.
        Returns:
        PID correction term

      • getLastSteerServoPower

        public double getLastSteerServoPower()
        Gets the last servo power applied to the steering servo.
        Returns:
        servo power after feedforward + PID
